name: COSTUME || Yue Min
description:
—bark bark! whinee…

· · ─ ·𖥸· ─ · ·

rock, paper, scissors was supposed to be a child’s game, not something that had decided her untimely demise.

now, stuck in this ridiculous HauHau costume, soaked with sweat and despair, she could only hold her breath when her crush unknowingly wants to take a picture with her.
